subcodes.first_line: At the conclusion of this blessed Tablet We make mention of Jináb-i-Kalb-'Alí Khán and Jináb-i-Ḥusayn Khán, and through Our loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در آخر صحیفه مبارکه ذکر جناب کلبعلیخان و جناب حسینخان را مینمائیم و بعنایت
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
